# Obligatory AI Generation Comment Guideline

## When to use

- Any time you create a new file
- Any time you create a new class

## Mandatory rule

Use this exact text:

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Required placement

1. Near the top of every newly created file
2. In or directly above every new class definition

## Validation checklist

- Exact text matches (case and spacing unchanged)
- Present in each newly created file
- Present for each newly created class
